explanation: The user indicates they do not want to use cup_0 and requests to pick up another cup. I first place the currently held cup_0 on the countertop to put it away. Then, I pick up cup_1 (a different cup), perform all the not-attempted steps from the old plan using cup_1 instead, and finally place it back on the countertop. This ensures the task is completed with a different cup as requested.
